summary.key_theme: 華爾街分析師普遍看好 First Solar 的長期成長潛力並調升目標價，儘管面臨集體訴訟與關稅政策的不確定性。

bullish.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on First Solar, Raises Price Target to $279
bullish.reason: Barclays 分析師 Christine Cho 維持「加碼」評級，並將目標價調升至 279 美元，顯示對公司營運前景的強烈信心。

bullish.title: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on First Solar, Raises Price Target to $270
bullish.reason: Susquehanna 分析師 Biju Perincheril 維持「正面」評級並上調目標價，反映市場對其技術競爭力與稅收抵免政策的正面預期。

bullish.title: First Solar (FSLR) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Weigh Tariffs And Tax Credits
bullish.reason: 分析師模型顯示公允價值從 243.59 美元提升至 251.90 美元，顯示關稅與稅收抵免政策對公司估值的正面支撐。

bullish.title: First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR): A Decent Value Stock with Strong Fundamentals and Attractive Valuation
bullish.reason: 強調公司具備強勁的獲利能力、近乎零負債的財務結構，被視為具吸引力的價值投資標的。

bullish.title: First Solar (FSLR) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
bullish.reason: 股價單日上漲 1.47 %，表現優於大盤，顯示短期市場買盤動能強勁。

bullish.title: This Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
bullish.reason: First Solar 被列入分析師看好的投資組合名單中，增強了市場對該股的關注度。

bearish.title: First Solar (FSLR) Faces Class Action Lawsuits Over Tariff And Production Claims
bearish.reason: 公司面臨關於關稅與生產聲明的集體訴訟，潛在的法律風險與賠償可能對股價造成負面衝擊。

neutral.title: First Solar, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 30, 2026
neutral.reason: 例行性財報發布預告，市場正等待 7 月 30 日的財報數據以確認營運表現。

neutral.title: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On First Solar with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $249
neutral.reason: Truist Securities 給予「持有」評級，顯示分析師對當前股價與未來成長空間持審慎態度。

neutral.title: Is First Solar (FSLR) Reasonable After Tariff Hopes And A 31% Gap?
neutral.reason: 探討股價在經歷大幅波動後的估值合理性，提醒投資人注意短期漲幅過大後的修正風險。

neutral.title: First Solar, Inc. (FSLR) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱度觀察，未提供具體利多或利空訊息，僅反映投資人關注度提升。

neutral.title: Here Are Tuesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls
neutral.reason: 綜合性市場研究報告，提及 First Solar 但未提供新的關鍵分析觀點。
